subcodes.first_line: O thou martyr, son of the martyr, steadfast in the Covenant and firm in the Testament, verily that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهید ابن الشهید الثابت علی العهد و الراسخ علی المیثاق فی الحقیقه آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Shrines and Holy places, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
